title: RepoPact's slice of the ForgeWire Labs public launch

acceptance_criteria.text: RepoPact launch assets drafted and operator-approved: README hero (the 'agent-proof your guarantees' wedge + adopt->dashboard demo), the 'AGENTS.md is not a contract' essay, and the RepoPact portion of the Show HN / X / Reddit copy. Drafts live in the private launch/ area; framing follows decision 0020.

The architecture paper (research/paper-outline.md expanded to a full draft) is posted to arXiv (cs.SE). [Operator-gated: arXiv account, cs.SE endorsement if required, final-text approval, submission.]
RepoPact published/refreshed on PyPI at the launch version with the positioning-aligned README; the conformance suite (019) is green and linked from the launch. [Operator-gated: PyPI release.]
Show HN posted and launch-day response handled per the playbook timing/anti-abuse rules. [Operator-gated: account karma warm-up, approval, posting.]
